name: golazo
description: Golazo — Modern Discord bot with full Discord API coverage (discord.js v14), MongoDB persistence, advanced command/component/event handling, and per-guild settings.

scripts.postinstall: node scripts/ensure-entry.js && node scripts/sync-fonts.js && node scripts/build-graphics.js && node scripts/sync-canvas-assets.js
scripts.test: npm run build:graphics && node --test src/database/transactions.test.js src/health/resolveHealthPort.test.js src/health/server.test.js src/metrics/registry.test.js src/utils/lruMap.test.js src/utils/interactionRateLimit.test.js src/utils/interactionError.test.js src/utils/redactSecrets.test.js src/utils/devCommands.test.js src/services/guildLifecycle.test.js src/i18n/i18n.test.js src/help/help.test.js src/dashboard/dashboard.test.js src/dashboard/design/design.test.js src/ui/ui.test.js src/ui/componentsV2.test.js src/canvas/canvas.test.js src/canvas/render.smoke.test.js src/graphics/graphics.smoke.test.js src/graphics/utils/contentBlock.test.js src/league/fixture/fixtureEngine.test.js src/league/match/matchResult.test.js src/league/algorithms/incrementalStandings.test.js src/league/algorithms/standingCalculator.test.js src/league/render/render.test.js src/league/render/constants/cacheConfig.test.js src/league/render/constants/layout.test.js src/league/discord/distributedLock.test.js src/league/discord/operationLock.test.js src/league/discord/interactionGuard.test.js src/league/discord/fixtureNav.test.js src/league/discord/scoreNav.test.js src/league/discord/standingsNav.test.js src/league/discord/teamListNav.test.js src/league/utils/formatAudit.test.js src/league/utils/validateLogoUrl.test.js src/league/utils/resolveTeamLogoUrl.test.js src/league/services/adminService.test.js src/league/constants/cardPageSize.test.js

author: Golazo contributors
